copyright: © 2026 NexVigilant, LLC. KSB competency decomposition is a proprietary methodology.
title: Academy Course Builder — AI-Powered PV Education
description: Generate pharmacovigilance training courses from topics. 5-stage pipeline: KSB decomposition (Knowledge-Skills-Behaviors), research enrichment, content generation, quality validation, and SCORM packaging. Produces structured learning modules aligned with NexVigilant PDC v4.1 competency framework.

tools.name: decompose-ksb
tools.description: Decompose a learning topic into the KSB framework: Knowledge (facts, concepts, theories), Skills (practical abilities, techniques), Behaviors (attitudes, professional conduct). Returns 2-4 components per category with learning objectives, key points, examples, and assessment criteria. Foundation step for course generation.

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: Learning topic to decompose (e.g., 'Signal Detection in Pharmacovigilance')

tools.name: generate-learning-objectives
tools.description: Generate specific, measurable learning objectives for a PV competency area using Bloom's Taxonomy action verbs. Each objective follows the ABCD format: Audience, Behavior, Condition, Degree.

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: Bloom's level: remember, understand, apply, analyze, evaluate, create

tools.name: assess-pv-readiness
tools.description: Assess an individual's pharmacovigilance readiness across PDC v4.1 domains. Maps self-reported experience to EPA competency levels (1-5) and recommends learning pathways.

parameters.name: domains_familiar
parameters.description: Comma-separated PV domains familiar with (e.g., 'signal detection, case processing')
